checks.result: Exactly ten journeys, five packet templates, strict Effect and interoperable schemas, bounded retained-detail roots, lifecycle/status/outcome, authority, readback, consequence, digest, and output semantics passed 59 tooling tests.

Ten Preview and 16 production-preflight fixtures passed; rerun_avoided byte-preserves prior detail, output_closed links a separate sidecar, interruption remains nonzero, and local preflight grants no external authority.

Docs, skill mirrors, authority, and verification policies passed. Three fresh Terra audits caused correction of four evidence-lifecycle/coherence defects; the final audit passed all eight scenarios and all 15 source hashes.

Effect setup, boundaries, 59 tooling tests, type-aware Ultracite, lint fixture, Knip, five typechecks, and 262 app/package tests passed using the documented public synthetic Executor endpoint with no API key or provider call.

Semantic commit 21341fa205a265f47401191e6cd471b6ea62ba0d was pushed; after fetch, local HEAD and origin/main resolved to that commit with tree 3c74eb29cfb5cb149dc32dea59080c7cdb003efb and the declared 51-path digest.

postcondition: Bundjil now owns ten critical journeys, honest qualification scope, typed proof packets, immutable evidence lifecycle, bounded legible receipts, strict local verification policy, and safe Preview/preflight producers without claiming external actuality.
rollback: Revert this closeout and 21341fa205a265f47401191e6cd471b6ea62ba0d together while preserving HGI-300 through HGI-304, HGI-308, and HGI-310 evidence and all unchanged provider state.
limitations: The accepted packet proves the exact local HGI-305 contract qualification only; Gateway recovery remains deferred and external journeys retain their partial or approval_gated scope pending HGI-309.
